channel.title: More News – UK Politics, Business, Tech and World
channel.description: More News delivers trusted UK journalism covering politics, business, technology, world affairs, health and sport with clear, independent reporting.

item.title: Andy Burnham Signals “Soft Launch” of Premiership Bid With Major Plan to Rewire UK Economy
item.description:
Andy Burnham has outlined a major political and economic vision focused on decentralising UK governance, expanding regional power, and increasing public ownership of key services.

The proposals include housing expansion, stronger local authority control, and restructuring Westminster decision-making, sparking speculation about a future leadership bid.

Read the full story:
Andy Burnham Signals “Soft Launch” of Premiership Bid With Major Plan to Rewire UK Economy

item.title: Sweden Selects Rolls-Royce SMR for First New Nuclear Power Project in More Than Four Decades
item.description:
Sweden's Vattenfall has selected Rolls-Royce SMR to develop the country's first new nuclear power project in more than 40 years.

The project marks a key milestone in Europe’s nuclear energy expansion and supports Sweden’s decarbonisation strategy.

Read the full story:
Sweden Selects Rolls-Royce SMR for First New Nuclear Power Project in More Than Four Decades
